Chia seeds are an excellent source of fiber, which can improve heart health, reduce cholesterol levels and promote intestinal health.

Zimaya Amber Is Great is a unisex fragrance, often described as sensual and enticing with a long-lasting sillage. It features a blend of sweet, fruity top notes (like peach and melon) with a warm amber, contrasted by fresh ozonic heart notes and a base of vanilla, musk, and patchouli.
